title: clerodendrum kaempferi f. album
intro: Clerodendrum kaempferi f. album, also known as the glabrous glory bower, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Lamiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Clerodendrum kaempferi f. album include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from digestive problems. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, allowing for various forms of medicinal use.
